blocks.content: Rotten Tomatoes’ premiere dates calendar keeps track of the most anticipated new 2026 TV premieres and your favorite returning shows. Bookmark this page to get updates on network schedules, when the latest Netflix series launch, when Disney+ shows will premiere, what films and specials are coming your way, and more.

Jackson Lamb (Gary Oldman) and his Slough House agents are set to return to Apple TV on September 16. Based on the sixth and seventh novels in Mick Herron’s book series, season 6 of Slow Horses should be a darker chapter of the overarching story, revolving around the team being systematically hunted and forced to go on the run.
Avatar: The Last Airbender: Season 2 – June 25, 2026

Aang, Katara, Sokka and the “Gaang” are officially back in live-action on Netflix on June 25, as the streamer announced with a brand new teaser. Season 2 of Avatar: The Last Airbender filmed back-to-back with season 3, which should also be the series’ final season if it follows suit from the original animated show, so it shouldn’t be too long before we get that third installment as well.

Prime Video has finally revealed the premiere date for Elle, its prequel series to the 2001 hit comedy Legally Blonde. The first season, which will debut in its entirety on July 1 on the streamer, follows a young Elle Woods (Lexi Minetree) in high school “as we learn about the life experiences that shaped her into the iconic young woman” originally played by Reese Witherspoon. In a bold show of confidence, Prime Video also announced that the show had already been renewed for a second season.
